title: PIM Activator managed configuration
description: Schema for the chrome.storage.managed configuration the PIM Activator extension reads on every popup load. Admins push values via the HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Edge\3rdparty\extensions\<extId>\policy registry path (or the Google\Chrome equivalent), typically via Intune ADMX-backed Configuration Profile.

tenantCatalog.title: Tenant catalog (JSON-encoded array)
tenantCatalog.description: A JSON-encoded array of tenant entries. Each entry: { name, tenantId, clientId, defaultJustification?, defaultDurationHours?, prefix?, entraPrefix?, azurePrefix?, groupNameFilter?, entraGroupRegex?, azureGroupRegex?, bulkActivateConfirmThreshold? }. The extension parses this string on every popup load and merges it with any locally-imported catalog before rendering the tenant-switcher dropdown. A per-entry bulkActivateConfirmThreshold overrides the tenant-wide bulkActivateConfirmThreshold value below for that tenant.

bulkActivateConfirmThreshold.title: Bulk-activate confirm threshold (tenant-wide)
bulkActivateConfirmThreshold.description: Number of selected roles at or above which the Activate button requires a second 'click again to confirm' before elevating. Lower it for extra caution, raise it for high-trust tenants that routinely activate many roles. Clamped to 1-100; omitted / invalid values fall back to the built-in default (5). A per-entry value in tenantCatalog overrides this for that tenant. This is an admin policy control only -- it is never exposed for user entry in the popup.
